title: [Skyship, Exterior]
description: A metal path hangs in the dark sky along the skyship's side.  Wide iron beams overhang the walkway, extending from the ship in sweeping wave-shaped curves and attaching to a half-wall that divides the path from a precipitous and dark drop.  Regardless of the area's caged appearance, there remains ample room to walk under the iron beams and alongside the half-wall.  In the distance at the path's end, a glaesine dome visibly rises from the ship.
